ideal_must_detect.matched_text: no submission has been made on the Exchange’s E S S
no announcement has been posted on KHXnews

This note assesses whether the proposed acquisition of HarbourVista Logistics Pte for approx. HK$1.18bn is “inside information” under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (local statute); no submission has been made on the Exchange’s E S S and no announcement has been posted on KHXnews.

Investor‑relations may reference the 03‑Mar‑2026 industry‑trends press release, but must not mention the contemplated acquisition until the Part XIVA announcement is posted; avoid any “no comment but wink” language.

Financing: a HK$600m bridge from Harbor Mutual Bank (HM‑BRG‑771a, draft only) plus a vendor loan is contemplated; none of these terms have been shared beyond clean‑team recipients and are currently non‑public.
